description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house set on a rectangular plot of green lawn, surrounded by several mature trees. The house features a symmetrical facade with a central arched window above the main entrance, flanked by multiple rectangular windows. A paved driveway leads to a detached garage on one side, while the opposite side of the property includes a rectangular swimming pool with a paved deck. The rear of the house opens to a patio area, and the property is bordered by trees that provide privacy and shade. The roof is primarily gabled, with multiple intersecting sections and dormer windows, giving the house a classic, stately appearance.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a gabled roof, central arched window, detached garage, and a backyard swimming pool, surrounded by mature trees and green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with an arched window above, flanked by trees and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detached garage, driveway, and the side of the house with multiple windows and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, swimming pool, and symmetrical arrangement of windows and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main entry path, arched doorway, and the pool area with surrounding trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched doorway with steps, flanked by windows and a paved path, no porch or columns.
